name: E-commerce Website
content:
1. Introduction
This document describes the requirements for an E-commerce web application that allows users to browse products, place orders, and manage accounts.
2. Overall Description
The system provides an online platform for buying and selling products. It supports customers, admins, and sellers.
3. Functional Requirements
User Registration & Login: Users can create accounts and log in.
Product Browsing: Users can view products by category.
Cart System: Users can add/remove products.
Order Management: Users can place and track orders.
Payment Integration: Support for online payments.
Admin Panel: Manage users, products, and orders.
4. Non-Functional Requirements
Performance: System should handle 1000+ users.
Security: Data encryption and secure authentication.
Scalability: System should support scaling.
Usability: Easy-to-use UI.
5. System Architecture
Frontend: React.js
Backend: Spring Boot
Database: PostgreSQL
6. User Roles
Customer, Admin, Seller
7. Constraints
Internet connectivity required.
Modern browser support required.
